ui.error.data_load_failed: Failed to load game definitions from data/.
ui.warehouse.title: Warehouse Cleanup
ui.warehouse.overflow_blocked: Return blocked: pending overflow limit reached. Discard items below to continue.

ui.recovery.title: Save Data Recovery
ui.recovery.message: The save file could not be read. Choose how to continue.
ui.recovery.start_new_confirm: Start new and keep the corrupted file aside? This cannot be undone.
class.march_captain.role: Grants a defense bonus to adjacent allies.
class.veteran_guard.role: Blocks enemy movement through adjacent tiles (Zone of Control).
class.watch_archer.role: Ranged attacker; cannot strike adjacent enemies.
class.frontier_scout.role: High mobility; ignores the Ash terrain movement penalty.
class.spearman.role: Gains a bonus against attackers who moved 2+ tiles (Brace).
class.heavy_infantry.role: Reduces knockback distance by 1 (never gets knocked back).
class.frontier_engineer.role: Once per battle, place a durability-10 barricade on an adjacent empty tile.
class.messenger_cavalry.role: After attacking, using a skill, or using an item, moves up to 2 tiles if still alive.
class.bandit.role: Aggressive raider with no special ability.
class.wolf.role: Hunts in a pack; hesitates to close in alone.
class.ashenhorn_boar.role: Boss: telegraphed charges and sweeping attacks; enrages at half HP.
item.first_aid_kit.name: First Aid Kit
item.field_treatment_kit.name: Field Treatment Kit
item.rescue_pack.name: Rescue Pack
item.camp_rations.name: Camp Rations
item.protective_board.name: Protective Board
item.return_flare.name: Return Flare
item.field_treatment_kit.description: Restore 10 HP in battle or camp.
item.rescue_pack.description: Revive one ally at camp with 25% HP.
item.camp_rations.description: Restore 5 HP to every living ally at camp.
item.protective_board.description: Place a barrier on an adjacent empty tile.
item.return_flare.description: Secure loot and return from camp immediately.

facility.command_post.role:
Reveals routes, enemy forces, and
deeper-region intelligence.
facility.training_ground.role:
Unlocks class techniques and new
tactical roles for the roster.
facility.forge.role:
Changes weapons, tuning traits,
and horizontal weapon branches.
facility.infirmary.role:
Improves medicine and survival
options used during expeditions.
facility.workshop.role:
Produces exploration tools and
battlefield-control equipment.
facility.barracks.role:
Expands recruitment, specialist
housing, and companion links.

exploration.cinderwatch_situation: Beyond the broken gate lies an abandoned watchpost. Fresh tracks mark the main passage.

exploration.side_path_effect: All surviving allies HP -2 / One fewer enemy
exploration.scout_route_effect: No attrition / Free placement in left 3 columns
exploration.scout_route_locked: Requires a Frontier Scout in the party

ui.deployment.deploy_all_to_start: Deploy everyone to begin the battle

ui.facilities.title: Facilities
exploration.ashbough_verge_situation: The entrance to Ashbough Forest. Deep among the tangled trees, a wolf pack holds its territory.
exploration.ashbough_side_path: B. Push Deeper In a Hurry
exploration.ashbough_side_path_effect: All surviving allies HP-2 / One fewer enemy / No wood from standard victory
exploration.ashbough_scout_route: C. [Frontier Scout] Track the Game Trail
exploration.ashbough_scout_route_effect: Full intel / Free placement in left 3 columns / Hide +1

exploration.reconnaissance_effect: New battle grants only standard materials (no first-clear rewards)

ui.camp.next_site_exploration: The next site begins with exploration.

cinderwatch.ash_road_note: Ash slows movement, and rubble is impassable.
cinderwatch.signal_tower_note: Watch posts and barriers favor defensive positions.
exploration.next_forest_site: The route opens into the next forest site.
